creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 148448
Be more permissive about SUITESPARSE_TIMER_ENABLED

Looking at the code SUITESPARSE_TIMER_ENABLED uses clock_gettime(2) which we support.

According to opengrok, we never define NTIME. Not sure how it would get defined but the attached patch (included in PR 175402) should make sure we compile it in even if NTIME is defined.
